beer.beer_description:
Light crackery Malt base, soft bitterness, big pineapple notes with splashes of Peaches, apricot & a zesty lime finish.

This beer was crafted with Voyager Compass, Rolled Oats & Carapils Malt, Motueka, Moutere, Riwaka & Rakau hops.

items.checkin_comment: Good fresh IPA, neipa flavours but not hazy. Noice.

user.bio: Inner West brewery enthusiast and bon vivant. Currently favouring boozy grapefruity IIPAs.

items.badge_description: Canning is all the rage and it's not hard to see why - travels well, more environmentally friendly, and no need to carry your bottle opener. That's 70 checkins with the serving style of Can. Try 5 more for Level 15! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

items.badge_description:
Everyone loves fresh beer, but obviously not as much as you do. You went straight to the source. 

That's a beer at 95 different venues categorized as a Brewery, Cidery or Meadery. Visit 5 more for Level 20!

items.badge_description: There's beer in them thar hills! You're setting off on your journey through the world of beer, but be sure to take a little time to get to know each brewery as you go. That's a beer from 375 different breweries. Try 5 more for Level 76!
